---
title: "transcripts"
date: '2025-11-14'
categories: [project, AI, tools]
github_url: "https://github.com/lawwu/transcripts"
project_url: "https://github.com/lawwu/transcripts"
image: "https://opengraph.github.com/repo/lawwu/transcripts"
stars: 15
project_lang: "Python"
---

Transcripts for various YouTube channels, inspired by [Karpathy's Lexicap](https://karpathy.ai/lexicap/index.html). Useful for searching and reading through long-form AI content without watching the full video.

[View on GitHub →](https://github.com/lawwu/transcripts)
